svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="双计数器收敛机制" id="noreviewconv"> <mxGraphModel dx="-440" dy="-151" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1000" pageHeight="640" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="双计数器怎么判断「评审真完了」" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="26" width="400" x="300" y="18" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="severe" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="严重问题计数器
连续 2 轮清零才算" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="200" x="80" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="minor" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="一般问题计数器
连续 3 轮清零才算" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="200" x="80" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="couple" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" value="耦合规则
任一计数器被打断
两个同时归零" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="96" width="180" x="360" y="105" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="both" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#0f766e;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="两个计数器同时达标
→ 评审收敛" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="620" y="115" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="round1" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="第 1 轮
严重 3 / 一般 5" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="130" x="80" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="round2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="第 2 轮
严重 0 / 一般 2" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="130" x="230" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="round3" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fef2f2;strokeColor=#dc2626;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="第 3 轮
严重 1 / 一般 0
严重计数被打断" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="150" x="380" y="284" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="round4" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="第 4 轮
严重 0 / 一般 0" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="130" x="550" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="round5" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ecfdf5;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="第 5 轮
严重 0 / 一般 0
双双达标 ✓" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="140" x="700" y="284" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="breaknote" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#dc2626;fontSize=11;" value="↑ 第 3 轮严重问题复现 → 两个计数器同时归零,从第 4 轮重新计数" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="480" x="260" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="breaker" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#dc2626;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="熔断阀
连续 10 轮问题数不下降
→ 中止回路,叫人介入" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="340" x="330" y="430" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="full" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" value="每 5 轮强制全量复审
刷新分桶,重扫全局" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="340" x="330" y="530" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="severe" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;" target="couple"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="minor" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;" target="couple"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="couple" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;" target="both" /> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 双计数器怎么判断「评审真完了」
